title: skillvet policy
description: Tune skillvet's scoring weights, verdict thresholds, and per-capability allow/deny. A policy never weakens skillvet's ability to SEE a capability; it only changes how that capability scores and gates.

name.description: Human label for this policy, shown in output.

block_below.description: Trust score strictly below this value => BLOCK.

review_below.description: Trust score strictly below this value => at least REVIEW.

content_weight.description: Score penalty per content-signature match (total capped at 24).

weights.description: Override the default per-capability score penalty.

allow.description: Capabilities that contribute 0 to the score and never force a verdict (still reported).

deny.description: Capabilities that force an unconditional BLOCK if present.
